summary: Completed frontend testing of workshop and video thumbnail display. All thumbnails are displaying correctly on candidate dashboard. WorkshopsPage now shows actual workshop.thumbnail instead of gradient placeholder. Past workshop recordings show thumbnails with play button overlay.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console) - same as iteration 7

critical_code_review_comments: WorkshopsPage.jsx correctly displays workshop.thumbnail for both upcoming and past workshops
Upcoming workshops with thumbnails show image on the left side of the card
Past workshop recordings show thumbnails with play button overlay and duration badge
VideosPage.jsx correctly displays video.thumbnail for all videos
Workshops without thumbnails (thumbnail: null) gracefully show text-only layout without broken image
Video player modal opens correctly when clicking on past workshop recordings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workshop and video thumbnail display verified working. WorkshopsPage shows thumbnails for upcoming workshops (if available) and past workshop recordings with play button overlay. VideosPage shows thumbnails for all videos. One video 'Structuring Video' has a relative path thumbnail /uploads/thumbnails/6707f3a7.png which loads correctly.

workshop_thumbnails_upcoming.details: Upcoming workshops with thumbnails display correctly (Test Workshop With Thumbnail, Fit Interview Excellence, Mental Math Bootcamp)

workshop_thumbnails_past.details: Past workshop recordings show thumbnails with play button overlay (Market Entry Strategies, Profitability Case Masterclass)

workshop_without_thumbnail.details: Workshops without thumbnails (Test Workshop) show text-only layout without broken image

video_thumbnails.details: Videos display thumbnails correctly from various sources (unsplash, YouTube auto-thumbnail, uploaded files)

video_player_modal_from_workshop.details: Clicking on past workshop recording opens video player modal with correct title, duration, mentor, and video player

mocked_apis.payments: Razorpay payments are MOCKED (no API keys configured)
